name: io.github.DataViking-Tech/synthpanel
title: SynthPanel
description: Run synthetic focus groups using AI personas. 12 MCP tools for single prompts, full panel runs, and v3 branching (adaptive) instruments across any LLM provider (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, xAI).

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key (if using Claude models — default)

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (if using GPT models)

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Google API key (if using Gemini models)

environmentVariables.name: XAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: xAI API key (if using Grok models)
